name: Easter Woven Standing Bunny - Threshold™
description:
Bring rustic style to your Easter setup with this Easter Woven Standing Bunny from Threshold™. Woven from grass with foam filling, this standing bunny also features a pink fabric ribbon around the neck for a charming touch of contrast. Intended for indoor use only, you can place it on any shelf or table alongside other spring- or Easter-themed decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
